Podcast Room Event Flow: POST /verify runs Stage 6/5/4/3/2/1 acceptance path with evidence
GET /graph/{answer_id} and GET /topology/evolution confirm persisted graph/topology
Newsrooms Council Event Flow: GET /newsrooms returns canonical dashboard page data with tabs, cards, and safety invariants
POST /newsrooms/sources registers local source metadata; SourceReliability is not TruthScore
POST /newsrooms/feeds and /newsrooms/feeds/{feed_id}/ingest create local feed/raw article records with no external calls
POST /newsrooms/articles/{article_id}/normalize and /extract-claims produce candidate claims and bounded scoring signals
POST /newsrooms/claims/{claim_id}/submit-stage6 creates candidate Stage 6 packets; packets are not final truth
POST /newsrooms/packages/{package_id}/text-article and /live-blog-update produce JSON-LD draft metadata only
POST /newsrooms/packages/{package_id}/video-bulletin and /studio-cues create preview-only studio metadata
POST /newsrooms/packages/{package_id}/news-to-debate hands off candidate claims to Podcast Forum Debates
GET /dashboard/safety-invariants and /api/dashboard/safety-invariants expose 14 enforced invariants including si-14
